subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Personal Protective Equipment
description: A 60-second lesson on Personal Protective Equipment.

hook.text: A hard hat saved a worker's life when a wrench fell 40 feet. PPE is the last line of defense.

buildup.text: PPE includes hard hats, safety glasses, gloves, respirators, and high-visibility clothing.

discovery.text: Each piece is designed for specific hazards—wrong PPE gives false confidence.

twist.text: PPE that doesn't fit properly provides little to no protection—sizing matters critically.

climax.text: PPE should be the last resort after engineering and administrative controls have been applied.

punchline.text: PPE doesn't remove the hazard. It just stands between you and it.

quiz.question: Where does PPE rank in the hierarchy of controls?
options: Last resort after all other controls
